meta.name: Lake Arrowhead Lodge Design System Tokens
meta.description: Machine-readable token definitions for Lake Arrowhead Lodge design system. Source of truth for runtime CSS vars and component styling.
meta.documentation: See docs/design-system/ for layer-by-layer governance and usage rules.

templates/head.php.role: Global CSS custom property declarations at :root
templates/head.php.next-action: Regenerate from color.json and typography.json tokens after approval

dist/styles/main.css.role: Compiled frontend CSS using runtime tokens

governance.drift-prevention: All new token values must be registered here before component use
governance.review-gate: Token changes require update to both JSON source and documentation
governance.approval-hierarchy: Foundation approval -> semantic token lock -> runtime implementation
governance.upward-feedback-loop: Components may raise token requests when needs are unmet; requests must be resolved before component lock
governance.lock-rule: No component can be marked locked/approved with unresolved token requests
